aucun_client_trouve: No customer found for this search.
poser_question: Ask a question about the portfolio
question_top_risque: Which customers are the most at risk?
question_cross_sell: Which customers should we target for cross-sell?
questions_comprises_intro: The assistant only recognizes the predefined questions above (exact wording) — any other phrasing will return an unrecognized-question message.
question_non_reconnue: I don't understand this question. Try one of the predefined questions above, using the exact same wording.
page_accueil_intro: Portfolio overview and data pipeline status.
page_portefeuille_intro: Customer portfolio composition by segment, risk, and geography.
page_comportement_intro: Digital engagement and transaction behavior of customers.
page_retention_intro: Customers at risk of disengagement, prioritized for commercial action.
page_360_intro: Full customer record: profile, behavior, risk, recommended actions.
page_opportunites_intro: Customers to target for cross-sell and upsell.
page_ia_intro: How the risk score is calculated, explained simply.
page_assistant_intro: Ask a natural-language question about the portfolio.
page_admin_intro: Administrator-only area — technical pipeline and log status.
alerte_risque_eleve: {pct} of customers show high credit risk — {n} high-value customers need special attention.
alerte_reclamations: {n} customers are at risk of leaving due to an unresolved complaint.
ia_intro_texte_1: Each customer's risk score isn't a black box: it's a weighted sum of 4 business factors, computed by an explicit rules engine.
ia_intro_texte_2: Weight of each factor in the final score:
ia_note_admin: The technical study comparing several machine learning models (AUC, precision, recall metrics) remains available for technical profiles in the Administration tab.
titre_scatter_valeur_engagement: Customer value vs Engagement — each point = 1 customer
annotation_scatter_risque: Red-zone points represent {montant} of at-risk balance
annotation_pyramide: The Premier segment represents {pct_nbi} of total NBI with only {pct_clients} of customers
alerte_risque_solde: {n} customers show high credit risk — they represent {solde} of managed balance.
upload_intro: Validates the structure of a new starter_dataset.xlsx (10 expected sheets) before any production rollout.
upload_valide: File valid: all 10 sheets are present and non-empty.
upload_instructions: The button below replays the whole pipeline (ingestion, dbt, ML — about 60 seconds) and refreshes the dashboard immediately. The result is then saved automatically: it becomes the reference for every instance, including after a restart or redeploy — no further action needed.
recalcul_succes: Recompute complete and persisted: this file becomes the new reference for every instance, including after a restart.
recalcul_succes_local_seulement: Recompute complete on this instance, but persistence failed (see logs) — the effect will be lost on restart.
